note: Hand-entered miami one-off events (curated holiday programming, etc.). Stable id, real lat/lon, ISO local startDateTime/endDateTime with the local offset. Past events are filtered automatically.

events.title: Miami July 4th 2026 Fireworks at Bayfront Park: America's Birthday Bash (250 United)
events.description: Celebrate America's 250th birthday at Bayfront Park in downtown Miami with a free, all-day Fourth of July festival featuring live concerts, food vendors, and a cutting-edge drone light show. The night ends with a spectacular fireworks display over Biscayne Bay, with free entry by RSVP, making it Miami's biggest family-friendly Independence Day celebration.

events.title: Coral Gables July 4th 2026 Fireworks Celebration at the Biltmore Hotel
events.description: Bring the family to the historic Biltmore Hotel for Coral Gables' Fourth of July celebration, featuring a patriotic concert by the Greater Miami Symphonic Band. The free festivities culminate in an aerial drone light show and fireworks at 9 p.m. honoring America's 250th birthday.

events.title: City of Doral July 4th 2026 Independence Day Celebration & Fireworks
events.description: Doral Central Park hosts the City of Doral's free Independence Day Celebration with family games, food vendors, and festive activities for all ages. The night closes with a 25-minute fireworks finale beginning at 9:20 p.m., a fun all-ages way to celebrate the Fourth of July.

events.title: Fort Lauderdale 4th of July 2026 Spectacular: Beach Fireworks & Drone Show
events.description: Fort Lauderdale Beach and Las Olas Oceanside Park host a free, day-long 4th of July Spectacular with a kids' zone, inflatable water slides, beach games, and live music. The night features a drone show at 8:45 p.m. followed by fireworks over the ocean at 9 p.m., family fun all day on the sand.
events.venue: Las Olas Oceanside Park / Fort Lauderdale Beach

events.title: Hollywood Beach July 4th 2026 Star-Spangled Spectacular Fireworks
events.description: Celebrate Independence Day on the Hollywood Beach Broadwalk at the free Star-Spangled Spectacular, with live entertainment beginning at 6 p.m. The festivities end with an offshore fireworks display at 9 p.m., a festive, family-friendly Fourth of July on the beach.

events.title: Deerfield Beach July 4th 2026 Celebration: Free Beach Fireworks
events.description: The City of Deerfield Beach brings its free 4th of July Celebration back to the beach with live music, food trucks, and kids' activities from 4 to 9 p.m. The night caps off with fireworks over the ocean at 9 p.m., a great all-ages Independence Day outing.
